resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-commodity-profile
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool commodity profile
resourceTemplates.description: Returns profile information for a commodity such as Gold, Crude Oil, Silver or Natural Gas. Requires the commodity ticker (e.g. GC=F or CL=F).

resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-commodity-quotes
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool commodity quotes
resourceTemplates.description: Returns historical price data for a commodity ticker. Optional startdate and enddate parameters define the time range in milliseconds since Unix epoch.
